== Notes for [[Item:Q52644|Q52644]] ==

{geni:about_me} HE WAS A BRAVE KING AND FOUGHT IN THE DEVASUR SANGRAM. HIS ORIGINAL NAME PURANJAYA. HE WAS ALSO KNOWN AS KAKUSTHSTHA, WHICH MEANS SEATED ON THE HUMP. HIS DYNASTY WAS ALSO KNOWN AS KAKUTHSTHA AFTER HIM.
<p>http://www.gloriousindia.com/history/dynasties/ikshvaku/index.html</p>
<p>http://www.gloriousindia.com/history/dynasties/ikshvaku/puranjaya.html</p>

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
6707A5D5CEA841EFBBFC9A22EF79916B6537

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
